<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get VRM persona"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/vrm/{entity_id}/persona"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve the persona data for the specified VRM model, including personality profile and Big Five traits.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
